acceptance_criteria.description: Root make succeeds and builds SSW and BattleSim
acceptance_criteria.expected: Build completes and outputs both executables.
acceptance_criteria.actual: make completed successfully and linked src/SSW and src/BattleSim.

acceptance_criteria.description: Full BattleSim GUI scenario battle run to completion
acceptance_criteria.expected: Interactive BattleSim scenario executed through completion without tactical UI wiring failures.
acceptance_criteria.actual: Unable to drive GUI to completion in this environment; xvfb-run/xdotool/wmctrl unavailable; non-interactive launch timed out (exit 124).

acceptance_criteria.description: Behavior consistency with pre-refactor FBattleScreen path
acceptance_criteria.expected: End-to-end behavioral consistency confirmed from scenario start through battle completion.
acceptance_criteria.actual: Startup smoke indicates no immediate launch-time wiring crash, but end-to-end equivalence cannot be confirmed without interactive battle completion.

acceptance_criteria.description: SSW smoke run reconfirmed after BattleSim validation
acceptance_criteria.expected: SSW launches successfully after BattleSim verification pass.
acceptance_criteria.actual: SSW launched and continued running until timeout (exit 124), consistent with smoke-launch success.
Blocker evidence and validation boundaries captured in tester artifacts.

unmet_acceptance_criteria.reason: Environment lacks interactive GUI automation capability required to complete full scenario battle run.
Cannot claim full behavioral consistency without AC2 end-to-end completion.
blocker_evidence: Only startup smoke validation was possible in non-interactive mode
